message.content:
Find the following in the booking-engine directory:
1. All shadcn/ui components in resources/js/Components/ui/ - list them all
2. The auth route definitions - look in routes/auth.php and routes/web.php for register/login routes
3. The RegisteredUserController.php in app/Http/Controllers/Auth/
4. Show full content of routes/auth.php

cwd: /Users/byrondevin/Desktop/Technical Take-Home Assessment (Intermediate Full-Stack Software Engineer - LekkeSlaap)
